mapper.select: SELECT category_id, name, parent_id FROM book_category WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT category_id, name, parent_id FROM book_category
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_category (category_id, name, parent_id) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{parentId})
mapper.update: UPDATE book_category SET name = #{name}, parent_id = #{parentId} WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
